problem_found: High old-article pressure from category pages; current stories were mixed with long older same-page lists.
root_cause: News, inbrief, and economy category pages are sorted newest-first but continue far beyond the monitoring window; scraper kept all article-shaped links before enrichment.
fix_applied: Enabled source-specific discovery date filtering before article-page enrichment; excluded Observer utility/image pages from article discovery.

problem_found: Zero useful Libya candidates; server-rendered latest/search pages expose mostly navigation, and broad section pages can produce regional non-Libya articles.
root_cause: Al Mashhad is a Next.js site; article lists are embedded in __NEXT_DATA__ resultSection payloads, while search endpoints are intermittently reset/empty and do not expose article anchors reliably.
fix_applied: Added Al Mashhad Next.js payload extraction, switched discovery to the News section payload surface, and restricted discovery matching to explicit Libya source keywords only.
after_rate: 0/0 Libya inside-window = 0.0%; non-Libya article noise suppressed
